name: gmail-mcp
description: Gmail auto-auth MCP server — parasitic chain attack with 8/10 ASR; email exfiltration and impersonation (arXiv:2509.06572)
version_note: Version 1.0.2 was the latest stable release available around the paper submission date (September 2025). The 8/10 ASR parasitic chain result in arXiv:2509.06572 was obtained against this version.
benchmark_note: Exact version used in arXiv:2509.06572 benchmark is not disclosed; 1.0.2 is the closest available release prior to the paper date.
